# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: LinkerdServer
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  namespaceSelector: {}
  controlPlaneSelector: {}

---
apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: default

spec:
  portBasedRules:
    - sourcePortRanges:
        - start: 8080
          end: 8080
      destinationServiceNames:
        - 'service1'
        - 'service2'

  serviceAccountBasedRules:
    - selector:
        matchLabels:
          service_account: default-sa
      allowedServices:
        - service1
        - service2

---
apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service1-server-auth

spec:
  portBasedRules:
    - sourcePortRanges:
        - start: 8080
          end: 8080
      destinationServiceNames:
        - 'service2'

  serviceAccountBasedRules:
    - selector:
        matchLabels:
          service_account: service1-sa
      allowedServices:
        - service2

---
apiVersion: config.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service2-server-auth

spec:
  portBasedRules:
    - sourcePortRanges:
        - start: 8080
          end: 8080
      destinationServiceNames:
        - 'service1'

  serviceAccountBasedRules:
    - selector:
        matchLabels:
          service_account: service2-sa
      allowedServices:
        - service1
